trail.val: Low-NA EUV output ≥60 in 2026, scaling to ≥80 in 2027 (vs 44 in 2025)
JPM: 90 EUV units 2027, 105 in 2028 (vs prior 81/85); capacity could do 110 Low-NA tools+ without new buildings
ASML guides Low-NA EUV & ArFi capacity +30%/yr for '27 & '28 → EUV cap ~85 ('27) / ~110 ('28); the 85 for 2027 came slightly BELOW buy-side 90-100 (the one soft spot) but 'can still be raised'

forward.note: 85 EUV for 2027 the soft spot; DUV immersion the positive surprise. Watch: whether 2027 EUV gets revised up from 85 toward 90-100 as orders firm.

trail.val: raised and narrowed FY26 to €36-40B, GM held 51-53%, H2-weighted
FY26 RAISED again to €43-45B at 54-56% GM — 2nd raise this year, >10ppt top-line upgrade with six months left; implied Q4 annualized rev ~$56B

forward.note: FY26 growth mix behind the €44B midpoint: EUV +45%, DUV+M&I +25%, IBM +30%; Memory +75%, Logic +25%. Q3'26 guide €11-12B (mid €11.5B) at 55-57% GM.

trail.val: UBS/Bernstein see 20-30% lift to '27/'28 consensus EPS post-print (DUV immersion +30%/yr vs cons +11/6%, GM >60% new models, value-based pricing)

forward.note: Estimates going up post-print; Bernstein PT €2,500 (Street-high), Redburn €2,100. Buy-side already at €43-50 FY27 EPS.

trail.val: JPM models ~200 immersion units in 2027 (vs cons 137); immersion rev 34.8% above cons, total DUV 39.3% above
ASML guides ArF-immersion capacity +30% in BOTH '27 & '28 (130→170→220) vs cons +11%/+6% — the big upside, tightly correlated with EUV; new-model GM potentially >60% on immersion mix

forward.note: Second under-modeled vector now confirmed by mgmt; the positive surprise of the print vs the light 85-EUV number.

trail.val: EUV layers/DRAM node 1b (~3-4) → 1c (~6-7, current) → 1d (~10, ~2028); DRAM materially stronger than CMD'24
TSMC booked 40-45 EUV for 2027, hard to get more as memory makers compete for same tools (DRAM EUV demand)
Memory 49% of Q2 revenue (first time ≥50% of system sales since 2H18); Memory rev +75% y/y vs ~40-50% WFE-memory — evidence of rising 1c→1d litho intensity

forward.note: DRAM is the new leg of the thesis; 2028 4F² transition a possible EUV-to-DRAM air-pocket (bear).

trail.val: UBS: WFE ~$250B CY28, into $300s CY29; ASML ~110 EUV slots ≈ ~$225B WFE before adding floor space
Redburn frames $68bn litho market / $54bn ASML system sales in 2030 at stable 91% litho share
Redburn PT €2,100: FY28E net sales €69.2B / EPS(dil) $77.5 / GM 59.4% / FCF €30.5B — pulls the out-year model well above the €44-60B CMD'24 frame

forward.note: CMD expected early 2027 likely raises the 2030 €44-60B frame; BofA models €70B mid-case. Backlog value at the Q4 report (Jan '27) the next hard catalyst.
